page.title: Template:Establishment category in country by century

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Establishment category in country by century]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Establishment category in country by century]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

<includeonly><!-- # The first step is to check whether this is being used on a YYYY establishments in [Country] category -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{FULLPAGENAME}}|pattern=^Category:%d%d?..-century establishments in .+$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%<!-- -->|<!-- # We are NOT on a valid page # So raise an error -->{{error|ERROR! {{t|Establishment category in country by century}} is for use only in a category of the name "Xth-century establishments in [Country]".}}<!-- -->[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Establishment category in country]]<!-- -->|<!-- # We are on a valid page # So invoke either the core (if not given |resolve=yes) # Or invoke the "resolve core" (if we are) -->{{Establishment category in country by century/{{#if:{{yesno|1={{{resolve|no}}}}}|resolve|core}} |1={{#expr: {{title century}} - 1}} |country={{{1}}} |sortkey={{{2|{{{1}}}}}} |ordinal={{ordinal|{{title century}}}} |previous_ordinal={{ordinal|{{#expr:{{title century}} - 1}}}} |next_ordinal={{ordinal|{{#expr:{{title century}} + 1}}}} |no-table={{yesno|1={{{no-table|}}}}} |decades={{yesno|1={{{decades|}}}}} }}<!-- close #ifeq error checking -->}}<!-- # Check for unknown parameters is primarily to catch the # pre-August 2024 syntax which took years as parameters # (e.g. {{EstcatCountryCentury|19|20th|19th|21st|2nd|the New Hebrides|New Hebrides}}), # but also has the positive side effect of catching other errors -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|1|2|decades|no-table|resolve|unknown=<!-- # We have unknown parameters # So issue a warning and categorize it appropriately -->ERROR! Unexpected parameter "_VALUE_" in {{t|Establishment category in country}}<!-- -->{{Category other|[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Establishment category in country by century]]}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><!-- # Note {{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, please, not here! Interwikis go to Wikidata! --></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Establishment_category_in_country_by_century for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{FULLPAGENAME}}|pattern=^Category:%d%d?..-century establishments in .+$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{error|ERROR! {{t|Establishment category in country by century}} is for use only in a category of the name "Xth-century establishments in [Country]".}}|{{Establishment category in country by century/{{#if:{{yesno|1={{{resolve|no}}}}}|resolve|core}}
            |1={{#expr: {{title century}} - 1}}
            |country={{{1}}}
            |sortkey={{{2|{{{1}}}}}}
            |ordinal={{ordinal|{{title century}}}}
            |previous_ordinal={{ordinal|{{#expr:{{title century}} - 1}}}}
            |next_ordinal={{ordinal|{{#expr:{{title century}} + 1}}}}
            |no-table={{yesno|1={{{no-table|}}}}}
            |decades={{yesno|1={{{decades|}}}}}
            }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|1|2|decades|no-table|resolve|unknown=ERROR! Unexpected parameter "_VALUE_" in {{t|Establishment category in country}}{{Category other|}}}}</includeonly>{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Establishment category in country]]
[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Establishment category in country by century]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
